nasb.text: All the days of his separation he shall not eat anything that is produced by the grape vine, from the seeds even to the skin.

esv.text: All the days of his separation he shall eat nothing that is produced by the grapevine, not even the seeds or the skins.

cnv.text: 在他離俗的日子，葡萄樹上出產的，無論是葡萄核或是葡萄皮，都不可吃。

ccb.text: 在做拿细耳人期间，葡萄树所结的，包括葡萄核和葡萄皮，都不可吃。
